purpose: Seed sources for taste-first link packs. These are starting points, not fixed rules.

lookbook_images.name: Vogue Runway - Menswear
lookbook_images.why: Reliable runway/lookbook image archive with designer context.

lookbook_images.name: Vogue Runway - Lemaire
lookbook_images.why: Quiet uniform, relaxed tailoring, understated styling.

lookbook_images.name: 032c Magazine
lookbook_images.why: Fashion plus culture, useful for stronger attitude and article references.

lookbook_images.name: Hypebeast Fashion
lookbook_images.why: Lookbook and streetwear drops; needs strict taste filtering.

lookbook_images.name: Highsnobiety Style
lookbook_images.why: Trend and editorial style links; useful but should avoid generic influencer pieces.

videos.name: SHOWstudio Fashion Film
videos.why: Fashion film archive and submissions, better for wild visual references.

videos.name: SHOWstudio Video
videos.why: Experimental fashion moving image and process references.

videos.name: Dazed Video
videos.why: Youth culture, art, music, fashion video references.

videos.name: Vimeo Staff Picks
videos.why: Useful for cinematic, unusual video language outside fashion.

articles.name: SSENSE Editorial
articles.why: Culture and fashion essays with stronger point of view.

articles.name: 032c Magazine
articles.why: Deep fashion/culture interviews and theory-adjacent pieces.

articles.name: Dazed Fashion
articles.why: Fashion culture with attitude; good for article angles.

articles.name: The Guardian Art & Design
articles.why: Architecture/design/culture depth that can feed lifestyle positioning.

articles.name: Vogue Business
articles.why: Fashion industry context, useful for deeper posts and captions.
